json_data.title: Introduction to Computer Networking
json_data.reason: This topic expands on the 'Network Manager' concept by exploring how computers communicate and share resources across networks.

json_data.title: Operating Systems Principles
json_data.reason: This topic delves deeper into the theoretical foundations and design of operating systems, building upon the basic understanding of OS components and their functions.

json_data.title: Distributed Systems
json_data.reason: This topic explores the challenges and designs of systems that operate across multiple networked computers, extending the concepts of OS resource management and cloud computing to a higher level.
